intro.p:
A given linear system has been represented by an augmented matrix and Gaussian elimination has begun. The current state of the process is shown below.
{{A}}

content.p: Execute the next two row operations that you would perform to continue the process of Gaussian elimination, clearly stating your steps by writing the explicit row operations you did. You should write at least two additional matrices to show your work.
Based on your final matrix, what would be the next row operation you would execute to continue Gaussian elimination? Simply state the next row operation; you need not perform it.
Without doing any further row operations, determine the number of solutions that this system has and explain your thinking.
